arts.ttl: Darren Eales outlines minimum Eddie Howe must achieve amid Newcastle United transfer budget risk
arts.sum: Despite talk of qualifying for the Champions League at the start of the season coming from the top at St James' Park, Eales insists that a place in Europe of any type would be acceptable this term. The year we were in the Champions League but didn't get through to Europe after Christmas, it obviously has an impact because that would have been revenue we would have got.
